summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Wasteland Zero roguelite RPG. Character creation flow works perfectly, inventory/skills/town screens functional, save system working. However, critical combat trigger bug persists - combat does not trigger when moving to fight tiles.

critical_bugs.issue: Combat does not trigger when moving to fight/elite tiles despite main agent claiming fix
critical_bugs.impact: Game-breaking - core combat gameplay remains non-functional
critical_bugs.details: Tested systematic movement to adjacent tiles. Only town tiles trigger properly. Combat tiles do not start combat screen despite moveToTile function being called.

integration_issues.issue: Many tile selectors not found during movement testing
integration_issues.details: Tile coordinate system may not match expected pattern or tiles not properly generated

passed_tests: Complete character creation flow: Title -> Saves -> Name -> Race -> Archetype -> Traits -> Map
Character name input and validation working
Race selection with 5 races (Human, Ghoul, Mutant, Android, Psyker) with stat bonuses
Archetype selection with multiple classes (Warrior, Scavenger, Doc, Grunt, Sniper, Pyro)
Trait selection with 2-trait requirement and various effects
Map screen loads with 7x7 grid (49 tiles) and character info display
Inventory screen shows equipped items and bag (0/30 items)
Skills screen shows comprehensive skill tree with Combat/Defense/Healing categories
Town screen with functional shop showing purchasable items with caps prices
Town screen has Clinic and Bounty tabs available
Navigation between screens (Inventory, Skills, Town) working properly
Character stats display (STR, AGI, INT, END, LCK) working
HP/XP bars and caps display functional

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - All UI screens and character creation working perfectly, but core combat system still broken

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Combat trigger system is still broken despite claimed fix. The moveToTile function in MapScreen.jsx is not properly triggering startCombat for fight/elite tiles. Investigation needed into: 1) Tile type detection logic, 2) Combat trigger conditions, 3) Map generation ensuring fight tiles exist. This is blocking core gameplay functionality.
